generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired Air Force colonel who's worked on strategic planning, I've seen firsthand how our over-reliance on foreign tech puts our national security at risk. We can't afford to wait for another crisis to act. Supporting strategic autonomy isn't just about being tough - it's about being smart. The experts agree: diversifying our supply chains and investing in domestic capabilities is the only way to ensure we're prepared for any threat. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
